description: Mind, emotion, fear, dream, and memory manipulation.
traits: Emotion Feeder
It feeds on what you feel. Fear, anger, joy, all of it is sustenance. It engineers situations to harvest the emotions it craves, leaving victims hollow.
Memory Thief
A touch steals what you remember. Knowledge, names, the faces of loved ones, all gone. It collects stolen memories like trophies while victims wander lost.
Fear Sculptor
It studies your deepest fears like an artist studying form, then gives them flesh. Its lair is a gallery of crystallized nightmares from past victims.
Guilt Manifest
It smells guilt the way a predator smells blood. Drawn to the conscience-stricken, it drags buried sins into the open and forces a reckoning.
Sorrow Crystallizer
Tears shed in its presence harden into gemstones. It has learned that sadness is profitable, and crafts elaborate sorrows like an artist working in grief.
Pain Librarian
Every kind of suffering, physical, emotional, spiritual, is cataloged in its vast mental archive. It approaches agony with academic precision, always seeking new entries.
Regret Harvester
It feeds on roads not taken, showing victims the lives they could have lived. Surrounded by echoes of what might have been, it offers second chances nobody should accept.
Nightmare Surgeon
It operates on dreams with delicate precision, implanting new fears or excising old traumas for a price. A black market exists for its services.
Fear Farmer
It plants phobias like seeds and tends them patiently over years. When the terror finally ripens, it harvests what it has cultivated.
Memory Walker
It steps physically into remembered experiences and rewrites them from within. It hides inside traumatic memories, changing the past one mind at a time.
Memory Maze
Its mind is a labyrinth built from stolen recollections. Anyone who touches its thoughts risks becoming lost among corridors of other people's lives.
Schadenfreude Incarnate
Misfortune is its only food. It follows the unlucky and engineers elaborate failures, growing fat on the suffering of others' mistakes.
Emotion Plague
Whatever it feels spreads like a disease to everyone nearby. A flash of its rage can ignite a riot. A wave of its despair can drown a city.
Pain Transferer
It redirects every wound it receives into someone else, or stores agony for later release. Its body is covered in scars that were never its own.
Dream Walker
It slips between sleeping minds like a traveler between towns. Whole villages suffer the same nightmare, and dream logic bleeds into waking life near it.
Dream Plague Carrier
Its nightmares are contagious. Dream of it once and you carry the infection to the next sleeper. Entire cities have gone afraid to close their eyes.
Infectious Laughter
Its laughter spreads on contact, leaving villages in fits of uncontrollable mirth. The sound is genuine, joyful, and completely impossible to stop.
Truth Burn
Honesty is poison to it. True words blister its skin, so it speaks only in lies and wraps itself in deception to survive.
